title: alnus × spuria subsp. tauschiana
intro: Alnus × spuria subsp. tauschiana is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the green alder (Alnus viridis) and the grey alder (Alnus incana). It is primarily found in Eastern Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, due to its high concentration of salicin and other bioactive compounds. Alnus × spuria subsp. tauschiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
